PaymentConnectorStatus.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATING | UPDATING | DELETING | READY | CREATE_FAILED | UPDATE_FAILED | DELETE_FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption

PaymentConnectorType.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CoinbaseCDP | StripePrivy  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

---

PaymentManagerId.description: The identifier of the parent payment manager
PaymentManagerId.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the parent payment manager

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^([0-9a-z][-]?){1,100}-[0-9a-z]{10}$  
Update requires: Replacement

PaymentConnectorId.description: The unique identifier for the payment connector
PaymentConnectorId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier for the payment connector

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^([0-9a-z][-]?){1,100}-[0-9a-z]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PaymentConnectorArn.description: Synthetic ARN for the payment connector (used for engine resolution)
PaymentConnectorArn.markdownDescription:
Synthetic ARN for the payment connector (used for engine resolution)

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[-a-z]{0,7}:bedrock-agentcore:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:payment-manager/[a-z0-9-]+/connector/[a-z0-9-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ConnectorName.description: The name of the payment connector
ConnectorName.markdownDescription:
The name of the payment connector

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,47}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.description: A description of the payment connector
Description.markdownDescription:
A description of the payment connector

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 4096  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9\s]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
